meta_title: For Students: passive income to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Passive Income to Solve Project Scaling
content.seo_description: Learn how to build passive income and overcome project scaling issues. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first app.
content.answer_block: To scale beyond manual effort, transition from building 'projects' to 'automated products.' Leverage Antigravity for architectural blueprints and Claude Code for rapid implementation. By automating your backend logic and deploying low-maintenance micro-SaaS tools, you transform your coding skills into a passive income engine that runs while you sleep.
content.intro:
You’ve built the MVP, but the walls are closing in. Every feature request feels like a mountain, and your project remains a static, manual labor trap that drains your time without generating a single cent. The dream of a scalable app is dying under the weight of your own hands.

But there is a shift happening in the industry. The most successful AI builders aren't working harder; they are architecting systems that work for them. By integrating Antigravity for structural precision and Claude Code for autonomous execution, you can break the cycle of manual maintenance and finally launch a product that scales automatically.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a small, high-pain problem that can be solved with a single API call. Scaling starts by narrowing your scope.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Evaluate these three niche ideas for potential passive income: [Insert Ideas]. Identify the one with the lowest maintenance overhead.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze my niche selection and suggest a MVP feature set that requires zero manual intervention.'

steps.title: Architecting for Zero-Touch Deployment
steps.description: Design a serverless architecture so you don't have to manage infrastructure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a serverless architecture diagram for a subscription-based AI tool using Vercel and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a Next.js project with Tailwind and Supabase authentication boilerplate.'

steps.title: Automating Core Logic
steps.description: Use AI to write the business logic that processes user requests without human intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust function to handle Stripe webhooks and trigger a database update upon successful payment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the payment webhook logic in /api/webhooks/stripe.ts and include error handling.'

steps.title: Implementing Autonomous Testing
steps.description: Ensure your code is resilient by automating your test suite to catch bugs before they hit production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Playwright tests for the user authentication and payment flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run all tests and identify any regressions in the current auth flow.'

steps.title: Deploying the Passive Engine
steps.description: Push your code to production and set up continuous deployment for a hands-off release cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a GitHub Actions workflow configuration for automated deployment to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a .github/workflows/deploy.yml file for automated production deployments.'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' problems; high-demand, low-complexity tools generate the most consistent passive income.
Use Claude Code to document your codebase as you build; future-proof your project so you can hand off maintenance later.
Never build custom auth if you can use Clerk or Auth0; focus your energy on the unique value proposition.
Implement automated error logging with Sentry immediately so you are notified of issues before users complain.
Treat your first project as a learning asset, not a unicorn; focus on the process of shipping to production.
content.next_steps: Once your app is live, focus on setting up a basic SEO landing page and a feedback loop to iterate based on actual user data rather than assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the community to back you. The only thing missing is your first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
